positive: A minimalist, stylish depiction of a stylized mountain range silhouette, formed by overlapping clean geometric shapes. The mountains are rendered in deep indigo and teal tones, set against a vibrant, geometric sunrise gradient of peach, coral, and golden yellow. The composition is balanced and central, with negative space providing crisp contrast. The art style is modern graphic design, evoking retro pop art and linocut print aesthetics. High contrast, crisp edges, vibrant color blocking, vector quality, perfect for t-shirt printing.
